ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Closed Lost for PE services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity"&& ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") && (ISPICKVAL(Close_Reason__c,"")|| ISBLANK(CloseDate)|| ISBLANK(Other_Detail__c) || ISBLANK(Lost_Date__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Close Date, Lost Date, Close Reason and Closed Stage Detail.
